_readme: Expected-output model for out/factor_salience.csv (step 4, AGGREGATE) — the core results table (RQ ii/iii). The pct_*_threads columns measure COVERAGE (share of threads mentioning the factor; a thread can mention several factors, so these overlap and do not sum to 100). pct_of_total_mentions measures RELATIVE WEIGHT (share of all factor mentions; sums to ~100 across rows, up to rounding).
